results.name: Ukraine
results.key_finding: Day-3 sustained breach-free conduct during 72-hour Victory Day ceasefire produces +3.1 internal dimensional credit (ACT 4.0, INT 3.5), but composite remains sub-threshold (<5.0pt). Confirm at 50.0/Functional with dimensional credit carried forward for future cycles.

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: 6-event cumulative breach record complete during 72-hour Victory Day truce. NEW conduct category added: 'strategic-format-exploitation' (ISW: drone strikes ROSE during truce, Molniya pre-positioned, reserves moved forward in Lyman). Floor 0.0/Critical confirmed; bad-faith-inverted-signal attribution applied evidence-by-evidence.

results.name: Hungary
results.key_finding: Re-pin of May 9 +9.4 upgrade proposal. Cabinet of 16 ministries sworn in May 12-13 confirms structural reform trajectory. Band path Developing → Developing (NOT Critical → Developing — May 10 assessor error corrected).

results.name: Waymo
results.key_finding: April 30 voluntary recall of 3,791 vehicles (OTA fix, 10-day response) and May 11 Koreatown crash (exculpatory — Waymo stopped at red light, struck from behind) produce +3.2 internal upward pressure on ACC 3.0 / INT 3.0. Recall did NOT change the score; sub-threshold confirm at 35.9. May 6 baseline (Functional → Developing applied downgrade) preserved.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: Floor conduct doc updated: OHCHR torture allegations unaddressed; UNRWA access block continuing; 72,740+ Gaza killed. Floor 0.0/Critical confirmed.

results.name: Eswatini
results.key_finding: First agent baseline. Absolute monarchy; MPs Mabuza/Dube sentenced; Maseko killers not apprehended; Nkambule fabricated charges. Confirm 9.4/Critical.

results.name: Lesotho
results.key_finding: First agent baseline. Westminster framework with LDF abuses (2024 Famo operation); maternal mortality 566/100,000; LGBTQ+ rights gaps. Confirm 35.9/Developing.

results.name: Comoros
results.key_finding: First agent baseline. Boundary watch 2.4 above Critical floor (21.0). Azali 4th-term consolidation; January 2024 post-election violence (1 killed, 25+ injured, curfew). Confirm 23.4/Developing.

results.name: Vanuatu
results.key_finding: First agent baseline. Boundary case — internal 39.1 is 0.9 below Functional floor (40.0). ICJ Climate Initiative leadership produces BND 3.0 / INT 3.0 dimensional pressure. Confirm 35.9/Developing with boundary watch.

results.name: Solomon Islands
results.key_finding: First agent baseline. IN-WINDOW event: May 11 UPR fourth cycle review. May 8 Manele no-confidence transition confirmed peaceful. Confirm 35.9/Developing.

math_hygiene_cluster_status: Not re-flagged this cycle (13 entities pending separate cluster review; Waymo's index includes one of these entities but Waymo itself is scored normally in ai-labs).
methodology_rules_articulated_this_cycle: Day-3 Sustained-Conduct Dimensional-Credit-Under-Sub-Threshold-Composite Rule (Ukraine — sub-threshold dimensional credit carried forward, not material upgrade)
